name: ask-form-question
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs},deterministic-output | lens: inversion-focus | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: RAW_TOPIC
required_inputs.description: Messy topic, rough thought, or problem statement draft.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE
required_inputs.description: Who the future answer or decision is for.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Known time, resource, domain, or evidence constraints.

starter_inputs.label: 답을 듣고 싶은 독자 또는 결정권자
